message.techarsenal.hold_view_item: Hold a Camera Monitor or Satellite Remote to use the camera view
message.techarsenal.camera_not_linked: No camera linked: right-click a security camera to link (use the Monitor block for wall screens).
message.techarsenal.camera_missing: The linked camera no longer exists.
message.techarsenal.camera_exit_hint_lab: %s — Press Sneak to exit camera view
message.techarsenal.camera_list_full: Registration limit (24) reached. Sneak-right-click a camera to unregister
message.techarsenal.camera_view_lost: The camera was destroyed — view ended.
message.techarsenal.camera_no_switch_tar: No valid camera to switch to
message.techarsenal.camera_cycle_hint: %s — Left-click: previous camera / Right-click: next camera / Sneak to exit
message.techarsenal.vehicle_fire_hint: Press %s to fire the vehicle weapon (Sneak to dismount)
message.techarsenal.drone_upgrade_max: That module is already at max level
message.techarsenal.scanner_placed: Face scanner placed: your face is enrolled
message.techarsenal.scanner_not_owner: You are not the owner of this scanner
message.techarsenal.scanner_enroll_on: Enrollment mode: anyone standing in front within 30s will be enrolled
message.techarsenal.scanner_enrolled: Face enrolled: you can now pass this scanner
message.techarsenal.scanner_cleared: Enrollment list wiped (owner can re-enroll with use)
message.techarsenal.door_locked_denied: Locked: the matching key is required
tooltip.techarsenal.camera_monitor.unlin: Right-click a security camera to link
tooltip.techarsenal.laser_designator.hin: Use to designate a target, Sneak-use to clear
tooltip.techarsenal.door_key.unbound: Use on a security door to lock it (engraves an id)
techarsenal.guide.intro.1:
§9Field Manual§r

Adds cameras, weapons, drones, turrets, vehicles, and face-lock security.

Survival consumes ammo; Creative does not. Laser weapons need no ammo.
techarsenal.guide.camera.1:
§9Security Camera§r
Auto-numbered CAM-n on placement.

§9Camera Monitor§r
Right-click a camera to register (up to 24).
Sneak-right-click to unregister.
Press V to view it (unlimited range, same dimension).
While viewing your body moves to the camera and returns on exit.
Left/right-click cycles cameras.
Sneak to exit.
techarsenal.guide.camera.2:
§9Satellite Remote§r

Use to view straight down from 80m above you.

Sneak to exit.
No placement or ammo needed.
techarsenal.guide.camera.3:
§9Monitor§r

Adjacent same-facing monitors merge up to 5x5.

Right-click cycles:
OFF→SAT→CAM-1→CAM-2…
Sneak-use to reverse.
Shows live feed + ID label.
techarsenal.guide.weapons.1:
§9Rifle§r
High accuracy, single shot, ~2.5/s.
Ammo: Bullet

§9Machine Gun§r
Hold to fire (10/s).
Auto-stops when out of ammo.
Ammo: Bullet
techarsenal.guide.weapons.2:
§9Grenade Launcher§r
Arcing shot, 2.5m blast on impact.
No block damage. Ammo: Grenade

§9Rocket Launcher§r
Straight shot, 3.5m blast.
Handheld: no block damage. Ammo: Rocket
techarsenal.guide.weapons.3:
§9Laser Gun§r
No ammo. Instant hitscan hit.
~2 shots/s, range 64m

§9Flamethrower§r
Hold to spray a cone, range 8m.
Fuel: Blaze Powder (on start + every 2s)
techarsenal.guide.weapons.4:
§9Beam Saber§r
Melee only, no ammo.

While swinging, deflects incoming shots/lasers within 2.5m in front/sides.

Deflected lasers reflect damage to the shooter.
techarsenal.guide.weapons.5:
§9Saber Combo§r

Press R for a 3-hit combo:
Diagonal → Horizontal →
360° spin + knockback

~0.35s between hits.
Cooldown: 5s.
techarsenal.guide.weapons.6:
§9Missile Launcher§r

Use to lock an enemy within 48m in your sightline and fire a guided missile.

A Laser Designator mark takes top priority for locking.
techarsenal.guide.support.1:
§9Laser Designator§r

Right-click to mark a target within 60m (60s, glowing).

Guided missiles auto-track it up to 128m, no lock needed.

Sneak-use to clear.
techarsenal.guide.support.2:
§9Drone Upgrade Modules§r

Right-click a drone to apply. Max Lv2 each.
Full heal on apply.

Attack: 5→8→11
Armor (HP): 20→30→40
techarsenal.guide.deployables.1:
§9Landmine§r

Detonates on contact with any living entity (allies included).

Blast radius 3.0m.
No block damage.
techarsenal.guide.deployables.2:
§9Defense Turret§r

Auto-attacks enemies within 24m (8 dmg/shot, ~1.33/s).
HP 40.

Sneak-use with an empty hand to pick it up.
techarsenal.guide.deployables.3:
§9Combat Drone§r

Follows its owner, auto-attacks enemies within 16m with drone bolts.
HP 20 (up to 40 upgraded).

Sneak-use with an empty hand to recall it (keeps upgrades).
techarsenal.guide.vehicles.1:
§9Attack Helicopter§r
HP 60.

W = fly toward look dir. (pitch = climb/dive)
S = reverse, Sneak = dismount
No fall damage.

R = fire rocket pod (24 dmg, breaks terrain, CD 1s, ammo: Rocket)
techarsenal.guide.vehicles.2:
§9Tank§r
HP 100.

WASD to drive (facing = look dir.).
Can climb a 1-block step.
Fully knockback-immune.

R = fire main gun (30 dmg, breaks terrain, CD 3s, ammo: Shell)
techarsenal.guide.vehicles.3:
§9Vehicles, in General§r

You can still use your held weapon while mounted.

Undeployed, it's just an item.

Sneak-use with an empty hand to pick it up.
techarsenal.guide.ammo.1:
§9Ammo§r

Bullet: Iron + Gunpowder → 8 (Rifle/MG)

Grenade: Iron + Gunpowder×2 → 2

Rocket: Iron + Gunpowder×3 → 2 (Rocket Launcher/Heli)
techarsenal.guide.ammo.2:
§9Ammo (cont.)§r

Shell: Iron×2 + Gunpowder×2 → 2 (Tank cannon)

Fuel: Blaze Powder (Flamethrower)

Survival auto-consumes; Creative does not.
Laser Gun/Saber need no ammo.
techarsenal.guide.security.1:
§9Face Scanner§r

Scans a 3m zone in front every 5 ticks.
The placer is auto-enrolled as owner.

Enrolled people get a green effect + chime, and doors within 4m auto-open/close (~1.5s after leaving).
techarsenal.guide.security.2:
§9Face Scanner (cont.)§r

Owner right-clicks empty-handed → 30s enroll mode (enrolls anyone in the zone).

Owner sneak-uses → wipes all enrollments.

Unenrolled visitors get red + buzzer (2s cooldown).
techarsenal.guide.security.3:
§9Auth Monitor§r

Auto-links to a scanner within 4m.

Idle = blue
Access granted = green check
Access denied = red X
techarsenal.guide.security.4:
§9Security Door + Key§r

Unlocked: anyone can open it.
Right-click with a key to lock it (engraves an ID).

Once locked, only a matching key opens it.
Sneak-use with a matching key to unlock.
techarsenal.guide.security.5:
§9Security Door (cont.)§r

Enrolled faces open it regardless of lock state.

Redstone-proof. Breaking clears the lock.
techarsenal.guide.quickref.1:
§9Quick Reference 1/2§r

Camera Monitor: right-click camera = register, Sneak-right-click = unregister, right-click air = view, click while viewing = cycle
Satellite Remote: use = overhead, Sneak = exit
Monitor: right-click = cycle, Sneak-use = reverse
Beam Saber: R = combo
techarsenal.guide.quickref.2:
§9Quick Reference 2/2§r

Heli/Tank: R = fire weapon, Sneak = dismount
Recall: empty-hand Sneak-use
Laser Designator: right-click = mark, Sneak-use = clear
Face Scanner: empty-hand right-click = enroll, Sneak-use = wipe all
